title: NetworkingAddressItem
content:
# NetworkingAddressItem


## Properties

- **address** (`string`): IPV4 address to reach the Service.
- **interface** (`string`): Interface responsible for hosting the Service.
- **port** (`integer`): Port designated for accessing the Service.
summary: Object with properties: address, interface, port

address.description: IPV4 address to reach the Service.

interface.description: Interface responsible for hosting the Service.

port.description: Port designated for accessing the Service.
